heading: Waiver of matching funds requirement under the Women’s Business Center program
label: 9004 Waiver of matching funds requirement under the Women’s Business Center program
text: During the period beginning on , and ending on , the requirement relating to obtaining cash contributions from non-Federal sources under is waived for any recipient of assistance under such .March 27, 2020June 30, 2021section 656(c)(1) of this titlesection 656 of this title
notes: Amendments2020— substituted “the period beginning on , and ending on ” for “the 3-month period beginning on ”.Pub. L. 116–260March 27, 2020June 30, 2021March 27, 2020
